title: State Transition
description: A record of a single state transition in an entity's lifecycle.

state.description: The state the entity was in during this period.

enteredAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this state was entered.

exitedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this state was exited. Omitted for the current state.

actor.description: Optional identifier of the actor who triggered this state transition.

reason.description: Optional reason or context for the state transition.

metadata.description: Optional additional context or data associated with this state period.
